_comment: Expected wildlint finding counts over a pinned real-world corpus. scripts/corpus_diff.py compares live counts to this; a drift fails the pre-release gate (RELEASING.md) so a false-positive explosion (e.g. WL005's v0.5.2 3->34 on django) is caught before tagging, not by external red-teaming. Update with `corpus_diff.py --update` ONLY after confirming a count change is intended, and record why.
